title: Logan Paul Never StreSS
type: AI-generated , Participatory Media , Pop Culture Reference
about:
Logan Paul Never StreSS is a series of AI video memes based on a blown-out photograph of influencer and YouTuber Logan Paul in which Paul is portrayed in a Nazi SS uniform as a stress-free, highly successful Chad or alpha male with low cortisol levels. The memes often incorporate the Agartha setting, are set to the song "Feel So Close" by Calvin Harris and feature crossovers with and references to other controversial, meme-related imagery and subjects, including Jeffrey Epstein , Charlie Kirk , looksmaxxing culture and more.

The meme was popularized on sites like TikTok in late January 2026, becoming increasingly prevalent online through early February 2026. It spawned several meme coins. The memes also feature heavy overlap with the Cortisol Spike meme format. The meme's name is often stylized with two capital Ss in "stress," a reference to the infamous Nazi paramilitary organization "SS."
origin:
It is unconfirmed where the original image of Logan Paul in the SS uniform that is featured in the meme comes from. The earliest known instance of a similar image is a Prime Hydration meme that shows Logan Paul in the same outfit next to KSI as Yakub , which was uploaded to Tenor [1] on December 11th, 2024. This may be the original image, but it is confirmed.

It is unconfirmed who posted the first Logan Paul "Never StreSS" meme, however, the earliest known example was posted on January 14th, 2026, by TikToker [6] @biago.07, which depicts various clips of Logan Paul and then numerous AI-generated videos of Paul in an SS uniform set to a slowed-down version of the song "Feel So Close" by Calvin Harris. The post gathered over 1.4 million views, 176,800 likes and 1,450 comments in three weeks.

Another early example was posted on January 22nd, 2026, by TikToker [2] @cerebro917, garnering over 1.8 million views in about two weeks. The edit begins with Logan Paul's forest clip , followed by several AI-generated videos of Paul in the SS uniform.
